title: Glowing Fake Ores
description:
Double slabs are changed into fake ores
both real and fake ores glow at darkness.
prank texture pack.
version from 1.16 to latest
body:
This time i present you "Glowing Fake Ores" texture pack.
This pack works on Double slab system means some double slab can be changed as fake ores
only double slabs change there textures.
its also add glowing to both real and fake ores
glow in both darkness and night time.
this pack is made to prank people to make them thing double slabs as ores.
 
# read carefully which double slabs are for which ores

Double Slab and there Changed Block Textures are:-

1) andesite_slab= Coal Ore
2) polished_andesite_slab= Deepslate Coal Ore
3) diorite_slab= Iron Ore
4) polished_diorite_slab= Deepslate Iron Ore
5) red_sandstone_slab= Copper Ore
6) smooth_red_sandstone_slab= Deepslate Copper Ore
7) cut_sandstone_slab= Gold Ore
8) smooth_sandstone_slab= Deepslate Gold Ore
9) granite_slab= Redstone Ore
10) polished_granite_slab= Deepslate Redstone Ore
11) polished_deepslate_slab= Emerald Ore
12) cobbled_deepslate_slab= Deepslate Emerald Ore
13) prismarine_slab= Lapis Lazuli Ore
14) prismarine_brick_slab= Deepslate Lapis Lazuli Ore
15) deepslate_brick_slab= Diamond Ore
16) deepslate_tile_slab= Deepslate Diamond Ore
17) red_nether_brick_slab= Nether Gold Ore
18) nether_brick_slab= Nether Quartz Ore
19) polished_blackstone_slab= Ancient Debris
20) blackstone_slab= Gilded Blackstone
21) polished_tuff_slab= Raw Iron Block
22) tuff_slab= Raw Copper Block
23) tuff_brick_slab= Raw Gold Block
24) smooth_stone_slab= Gold Block

For Glowing
-Continuity
Or
-Optifine
Emissive Texture should Turn on.

This pack is supported both single player world and multiplayer servers.

version supported
form- 1.16 TO Latest version

make sure you check the file version before downloading the pack
all versions have separate files

 

Enjoy the "Glowing Fake Ores" Pack.
 

THANKS FOR DOWNLOAD.
